description_long: This is a futuristic, science-fiction inspired airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage and four prominent cylindrical engines mounted on the wings. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the midsection of the fuselage, each equipped with laser cannon-like protrusions at the tips. The body is primarily metallic silver with orange and black accent markings, and the cockpit is located at the front, featuring a transparent canopy and a visible astromech droid behind it. The rear of the airplane displays two glowing purple engine exhausts, suggesting advanced propulsion technology. The surface is detailed with panel lines, vents, and mechanical components, giving it a highly engineered appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic starfighter craft from popular science fiction franchises.
description: A sleek, metallic sci-fi airplane with four cylindrical engines, straight mid-mounted wings, and orange-black accents. Features a front cockpit with a transparent canopy and detailed mechanical surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing and engine arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, straight wings, and visible engine and weapon details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin glowing purple engine exhausts and the astromech droid behind the cockpit.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the engine and wing-mounted weaponry.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, horizontal wings featuring laser cannon-like extensions at the tips and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted in pairs on each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear (implied by design, not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy and an astromech droid socket directly behind.
